description_long: This object is a sculpted stone head, likely representing a stylized human or deity, with a smooth, glossy white surface and subtle marbling. The facial features are delicately carved, with closed eyes, a serene expression, and a prominent, elongated headdress or crown that extends backward. The stone appears to be a single solid piece, with no visible seams or joints, and the surface is highly polished, reflecting light in a glossy manner. The back of the head is rounded and bulbous, while the front is more detailed, showcasing the facial features and the base of the headdress. There are faint natural veins and color variations throughout the stone, adding to its visual interest. The overall form is monolithic and imposing, suggesting it could serve as a decorative or symbolic barrier in an urban setting.
description: A glossy, white sculpted stone head with a serene face and an elongated headdress, featuring subtle marbling and a highly polished surface.
description_view_0: Side view showing the rounded back of the head and the smooth, marbled surface with minimal facial detail visible.
description_view_1: Rear view highlighting the protruding headdress and the broad, smooth back of the stone, with no facial features visible.
description_view_2: Angled top view displaying the elongated headdress and the transition from the crown to the face, with some facial features partially visible.
description_view_3: Frontal view clearly showing the carved face, serene expression, and the central ridge of the headdress.
attribute_placement: set as a standalone feature on a pedestal or directly on pavement
attribute_pattern: Subtle natural marbling and veining throughout the stone, with smooth, carved facial features and headdress details.
attribute_weathering: Smooth and polished, with minimal visible weathering or surface aging, indicating recent placement or regular maintenance.
attribute_integration_with_surroundings: Contrasts sharply with man-made structures and pavement, serving as a focal point or decorative barrier in open urban spaces.
